snippet.title: Mean Girls | Official Trailer (2024 Movie)
snippet.description:
Get in loser, we’re going to the movies. 💖 Watch the new trailer for #MeanGirls #OnWednesdaysWeWearPink 

Watch Mean Girls on Digital TODAY: https://paramnt.us/WatchMeanGirlsNow 💅 

From the comedic mind of Tina Fey comes a new twist on the modern classic, MEAN GIRLS. New student Cady Heron (Angourie Rice) is welcomed into the top of the social food chain by the elite group of popular girls called “The Plastics,” ruled by the conniving queen bee Regina George (Reneé Rapp) and her minions Gretchen (Bebe Wood) and Karen (Avantika). However, when Cady makes the major misstep of falling for Regina’s ex-boyfriend Aaron Samuels (Christopher Briney), she finds herself prey in Regina’s crosshairs. As Cady sets to take down the group’s apex predator with the help of her outcast friends Janis (Auli’i Cravalho) and Damian (Jaquel Spivey), she must learn how to stay true to herself while navigating the most cutthroat jungle of all: high school.

Connect with #MeanGirls online:
Official Site: https://meangirls.com
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@meangirls
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/meangirls/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/MeanGirls
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/meangirls/

Sign up for EXCLUSIVE content & updates: https://www.meangirls.com/signup/

Paramount Pictures Corporation (PPC), a major global producer and distributor of filmed entertainment, is a unit of Viacom (NASDAQ: VIAB, VIA), home to premier global media brands that create compelling television programs, motion pictures, short-form content, apps, games, consumer products, social media experiences, and other entertainment content for audiences in more than 180 countries.
